description: Developer segment on the pricing page: pinned items, no RAG. The recorded response omits one pinned item (append path must restore it), invents a bento card link and a markdown link (both must be stripped by the URL guard), and invents a plan price (the numeric guard must drop that plan, keeping the grounded ones).
